entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: A cereal crop used as the primary subject for the transcript map

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop used for comparative genome analysis

entities.name: BARLEY TRANSCRIPT MAP
entities.description: An integrated consensus map of the barley genome comprising over 1,000 loci

entities.name: EST-BASED MARKERS
entities.description: Markers derived from expressed sequence tags used in the barley transcript map

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism markers used in the map

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used in the map

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphism markers used in the map

entities.name: ANCHOR MARKERS
entities.description: Markers from previously published data used to anchor the transcript map

entities.name: DH POPULATIONS
entities.description: Doubled haploid populations used for the mapping process

entities.name: BARLEY LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: The seven individual linkage groups of the barley genome

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 4H
entities.description: A specific barley chromosome with a linkage group length of 130 cM

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 3H
entities.description: A specific barley chromosome with a linkage group length of 199 cM

entities.name: RICE GENOME
entities.description: The genomic structure of rice used for synteny analysis

entities.name: GENOME COLINEARITY
entities.description: The linear correspondence between the barley and rice genomes

entities.name: GENOME DUPLICATIONS
entities.description: Ancient genome duplication events predating the divergence of rice and barley

entities.name: MARKER SATURATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the density of markers in a genomic region

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes identified at agronomically important loci using the transcript map

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GRASS GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of genomic similarities and differences across grass species

entities.name: GENETIC AND PHYSICAL MAPPING
entities.description: The integration of genetic and physical location information of markers
